title: malaxis protracta
intro: Malaxis protracta, also known as the long-spurred orchid or Malaxis, is a type of flowering plant that belongs to the orchid family. It is primarily found in the tropical regions of Central and South America, where it grows in the shade of dense forests. The plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma, due to its expectorant and anti-inflammatory properties. Malaxis protracta can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or tinctures, which can be consumed to reap its health benefits, including reducing inflammation and relieving respiratory symptoms.
